history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because recipe FQNs with inline JSON parameters were not parsed correctly; the runner treated the entire string as a recipe name.
history.qwen_rationale: The OpenRewrite runner expects recipes with parameters to be expressed as mappings with a 'name' field and parameter fields, not as FQN strings with appended JSON. Fixing the recipe format will allow the chain to proceed.
